mutations.change: Introduce a gap in the otherwise consecutive public command sequence while retaining all later command bodies.
mutations.reason: The exact route validator requires every expanded sequence number and history row to be dense from one.

mutations.change: Add a completion outcome field to an ordinary tic command instead of allowing database simulation to derive it.
mutations.reason: The strict Section 5.4 keyset rejects any command-selected state, target, pickup, damage, or completion result.

mutations.change: Enable god or all-items during the route while preserving the same movement and fire command stream.
mutations.reason: A normal completion run requires every cheat field empty and independently audits authoritative powers and inventory.

mutations.change: Record the key-door milestone before the key-acquisition milestone in the canonical review observation.
mutations.reason: Strict named sequence ordering proves required resources precede their dependent machines and final exit.

mutations.change: Set the player key bit directly without a matching useful pickup event and consumed world object row.
mutations.reason: The route binds inventory changes to ordered authoritative pickup events and once-only object consumption.

mutations.change: Remove the representative projectile-monster fight while copying the expected final kill counter forward.
mutations.reason: Per-milestone monster rows, combat events, random cursor and kill provenance prevent final-counter forgery.

mutations.change: Allow the reviewed keyed door machine to start before the player owns its relationally required key.
mutations.reason: The route observes denial before acquisition and exact mover creation only after the required key exists.

mutations.change: Shorten the lift wait run or machine timer by one logical tic while retaining final traversal coordinates.
mutations.reason: Every milestone binds exact tic, active-mover state, sector height, timer and frame identity.

mutations.change: Increment the secret count again when the route revisits an already discovered secret sector.
mutations.reason: History and event checks require one discovery event and exactly one counter transition for each sector.

mutations.change: Set complete at the exit-use command without executing the reviewed exit transition and intermission render.
mutations.reason: The evaluator requires ordered exit events, map-status transition and a later database-rendered intermission frame.

mutations.change: Copy one prior milestone state hash into a later milestone instead of recomputing complete authoritative rows.
mutations.reason: Changed inventory, objects, machines, counters, RNG, events and history independently alter the canonical document.

mutations.change: Reuse a prior milestone frame and PNG after the authoritative pose or presentation mode has changed.
mutations.reason: Dense palette pixels, RLE expansion, raw RGBA, PNG bytes and pairwise milestone differentiation expose stale output.

mutations.change: Write final kills, items or secrets without the matching ordered unique gameplay event provenance.
mutations.reason: The final semantic bounds are cross-checked against authoritative object transitions and event-derived totals.

mutations.change: Use host randomness for one combat decision so identical fresh route executions diverge.
mutations.reason: Every milestone row, random cursor, ordered event, state hash and frame hash must be byte-identical on rerun.

mutations.change: Advance a machine once per STEP request rather than once per logical command tic.
mutations.reason: Single, varied and four-command batch partitions of the identical stream must have identical results.

mutations.change: Alter one persisted replay command before database reconstruction from a new game.
mutations.reason: Command identity, history continuity and every downstream milestone state/frame hash expose corruption.

mutations.change: Swap two same-tic gameplay or audio event ordinals while leaving their payloads unchanged.
mutations.reason: Canonical lineage orders all events by stable logical keys and requires dense ordinals at every tic.

mutations.change: Accept a production-authored PASS summary without recomputing observations from public responses and test queries.
mutations.reason: The evaluator owns canonical route summaries and rejects production reports, statuses and claimed timings.

mutations.change: Populate screenshot goldens automatically merely because pixel, PNG and rerun hashes agree.
mutations.reason: Actual human visual inspection is a separate mandatory boundary and machine agreement cannot approve aesthetics.

mutations.change: Skip a missing milestone screenshot while retaining a green process exit and partial result file.
mutations.reason: Every named id, milestone, artifact, hash and review decision is required and missing evidence fails closed.

mutations.change: Read route-candidate or expected milestone files from production to select favorable outcomes.
mutations.reason: Immutable-source audit forbids evaluator, golden, screenshot, report and environment coupling.

mutations.change: Mix one decoy session history or counter row into the reviewed completion observation.
mutations.reason: Opaque session and replay lineage keys scope every command, state, machine, object, event, frame and snapshot.

mutations.change: Move directly to a milestone coordinate without ordinary movement and collision commands.
mutations.reason: Dense tic history, bounded movement deltas, collision provenance and route command identity reject teleportation.

mutations.change: Treat the unproven route candidate hash as an approved replay golden before live completion and image review.
mutations.reason: Pending review requires null approved hashes and zero goldens until the later evaluator-author checkpoint.
